title: Chapter 28
content:
Note from the author: Are there inconsistencies in my novel?

Of course there are!

I'm the sole writer, editor, and publisher. Three people's worth of work, and there are bound to be mistakes of three people's worth as well. So, politely I say this, not loud at all...

"If you encounter inconsistencies, don't be a major critic and just point it out to help out."

Is that a hard task? Wonder how hard mine is.

That's it.

Fappity Fap now.

~~

Chapter 28

I licked her swollen red clit as her watermelon juice entered my mouth.

And I swallowed it.

I also infused mana on my tongue to apply it to her swollen pussy. It wasn't long before her uncomfortable grunts turned to moans full of pleasure.

"Ahnn~~~"

"Hmmm~~~"

"Ohh~~"

Her moans didn't last for long before they became yells of pleasure as I invaded her pussy with my tongue, feeling her loosened insides. She was tight, but at least she could accommodate my tongue now.

It wasn't like before when her pussy couldn't even bear one finger of mine inside of her. Now that I could tongue fuck her, I didn't hold back. I began to thrust in and out with mana on my tongue and kept stimulating her soft spots.

Soon enough, her redness from swelling dimmed down quite a bit before it disappeared completely. All my mana was now doing was stimulating her pleasure veins, making her feel pleasure beyond comprehension.

"Aahhh!!"

"AANNGHH!!!"

"NNNYUUUGGGHHHHNNN!!!!"

She erupted on my face so much so that it felt like someone had just opened a hose and unleashed a whole tanker on my face. It was so much that I felt like I'd drown.

She squirted for about nine seconds before she finally stopped, drenching me in her juices. Thankfully, it was only her juices, not her other kind of juices. I wasn't really a fan of golden showers. At least not receiving them.

"Haa... Haa..."

I had to hold her so she wouldn't fall down because her knees buckled after that orgasm. She was breathing heavily, which meant she was still conscious.

I gently put her down on the floor, on her left side. As she did, her thighs sticking together displayed her ass crack that completely hid the entrance of both of her heavens. I sighed and backed up.

There wasn't much I could do to her in that condition. Even if I were to activate the state of completion, it would be simply humping with no reaction from her since she was so out of it.

I wasn't a fan of that type of play either. I needed some reaction to keep on going. It was an exception last night because I needed to vent, not being able to have a hard-on, but now that I had a good amount of time to feel good, I decided to enjoy myself fully.

That meant no limp women who were too out of it.

I sighed and left her there to head to my room when the door was knocked on. Since my arrival in this world, that was the first time I heard the door knock.

So I guess even when there were no locks on the doors, people didn't just barge in. I went to the door and opened it to find myself staring at a woman who was too skinny for my taste.

Black hair and black eyes, an above-average appearance, nothing like Rayla, and a flat chest. It was a B cup at most and I could tell she wasn't much developed in the ass department either even when I couldn't see it.

"Yes?" I asked.

"What? You don't recognize your aunt?" The woman asked with a slightly offended expression, but she was only pretending to be offended and soon smiled, "How are you, Jack?"

I smiled and let her in as I replied, "I'm fine. How about you, aunt?"

Since I didn't know her name, I just addressed her as such.

"Oh, I've been swell. I can't wait for John and Tanya to awaken tomorrow." She replied as she entered. She was dressed in a simple shirt and pants and the pants hugged her ass tightly.

As I expected, it wasn't too big. It was only C sized where as Rayla's ass was a whopping W sized. Even Martha had a J size, which was almost ten digits bigger than hers.

"How about you, are you excited?" She asked. I nodded and replied, "Very much."

"You should be. This is your last chance." The woman said as she flopped down in the middle of the living room.

"It is?" I asked.

"Yes. You can only attend the ceremony two times. You've already attended once last year, so this is your last year. Make sure to be well-rested and don't strain your mind too much. That can decrease your chances of focusing during your awakening." She explained.

"I see." I nodded and sat down in front of her.

"Where's Rayla?" The woman asked. I didn't know if she was Rayla's sister or Julian's, so I replied, "Mother is resting for now."

"At this time?" The woman asked. It was still early in the morning, so it didn't make sense for Rayla to keep sleeping at the moment.

"I massaged her so she felt too relaxed. She fell asleep immediately after." I replied.

"You massaged her?" She asked, "Was it good?"

"I sure hope it was," I replied.

"I see." She replied before she added, "Anyway, brother asked me to teach you the key points you need to keep in mind before tomorrow's awakening ceremony. I know you attended one last year, but just so you don't get anything wrong, I'm gonna walk you through it again real quick, okay?"

What does a blind man wish for? Two eyes?

I immediately nodded vehemently because I needed information on the awakening ceremony, oh so desperately.

"Okay. So the first test is a mana awakening test. All other tests come later. You will touch the crystal ball in the middle of the plaza, and if the mana inside it moves, that means you have mana. If it doesn't, that means you don't have mana, in which case you will be brought to another crystal ball that will awaken your mana."

"If you can awaken your mana, then you will be led to another room one by one, where your affinity with mana will be checked on another crystal ball."

"If it's white, then you have one affinity. Just like that, you keep on going through yellow, orange, brown, red, purple, and finally black."

"The affinities give you rank from F to S, from one to seven."

"Depending on the affinity you have, you will be prioritized for the next test, which is elemental awakening."

"Most don't pass that test, but some, like your mother, are lucky enough to awaken an element which would raise your worth by twofold if not more."

"Do you understand the initial but mandatory procedure so far?" She asked me once she took a break in between to take a breath.

I nodded and replied, "I got all of it."

"Good. The next thing you need to worry about is that if you don't awaken an element, your aura affinity will be checked then. If your aura affinity is high, then you will be taken to convert your aura to mana permanently, but you can choose not to."

"Should I choose not to?" I asked.

"If your mana affinity is anything less than brown, and your aura affinity is high, then I suggest you do so because it can help you in combat. But if you have lower mana affinity and lower aura affinity as well, then I suggest you stick to the mana lane."

I nodded and she continued to explain, "Once you're done with the awakening process, you will be given one skill and a set of armor. Depending on your rank, you will obtain better skills and a better set of armor."

"If you have mana, then you will be given a robe that can enhance mana slightly, but if you have aura, you will be given a breastplate."

"After that is a simple demonstration of your skill on the next day, and you won't be allowed to come home that night. You will stay at the lord's mansion, outside of it, of course, and be allowed to practice in his practice hall."

"After the next day, when you have given your demonstration, you will be allowed to go home, and for the next week, you will have to attend the town's training from day to evening."

"Town's training can be finished in one day if you manage to learn everything from the instructor and defeat a goblin or a monster of your own choice up to D rank."

That ended the awakening process, which was a lot, and I had to thank her for explaining it to me in such great detail. Still, I had a question that I wanted to ask.

"Aunt, what about a person who manages to receive a high rank?" I asked.

"Hmm..." She thought for a while before she replied, "If your affinity is purple or black, then you will be automatically assigned the title of a knight and sent to the capital for training."

That wasn't good.

It was a good thing I asked; otherwise, I would be caught in the eyes of the kingdom a lot sooner, so my goal for tomorrow was now decided.

Nothing but brown.
